overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi survival game showing an astronaut character exploring a dimly lit industrial space station or Mars base called 'Fort Solis'. The character moves through locker rooms, airlocks, and corridors with shifting colored lighting (teal, yellow, red), eventually taking an elevator to a lower level. The environment features heavy industrial design with metal airlock doors, equipment storage, and emergency lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: equipment locker room and preparation area

agents.ego_description: walking through the locker room, examining equipment storage and approaching the airlock door

entered.detail: tall gray metal lockers with equipment inside
shelves holding red and green equipment bags
illuminated sign reading WELCOME TO FORT SOLIS above the airlock door
heavy circular airlock door with mechanical locking mechanism

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a compact equipment room with teal lighting, surrounded by metal lockers and storage racks. A prominent sign welcomes visitors to Fort Solis above a heavy airlock door at the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor and observation hub with exterior view

events.description: lighting shifts from teal to warm yellow as character enters the transitional corridor
exits the yellow corridor into a darker hub area with red emergency lighting and a view of the exterior landscape

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the airlock into a larger hub area, moving toward the exterior viewing windows

entered.detail: narrow passage with warm yellow overhead lighting connecting the locker room to the hub
large curved window showing the dark exterior landscape and rocky terrain
wall with illuminated TERA corporate logo and text
red warning lights illuminating the right side of the hub area

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a yellow-lit transitional corridor into a larger hub space with dramatic red emergency lighting. To the left, a large curved window reveals the dark exterior landscape, while the TERA logo is visible on the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor leading to vertical transportation

events.description: enters a secondary airlock leaving the main hub area
character enters the elevator cage and approaches the control panel

agents.ego_description: walking through industrial corridors and entering the elevator to descend to a lower level

entered.detail: narrow passage with overhead pipes and yellow lighting
metal mesh elevator with blue frame and safety railings
digital interface showing level selection options B1 and B2

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through a narrow industrial corridor with yellow lighting, passing through another airlock and entering a caged elevator. The character approaches the control panel to select a destination level.

events.description: elevator interior lights dim and shift to red as the descent begins
elevator comes to a stop and the doors open to reveal the lower level corridor

agents.ego_description: standing in the elevator cage, interacting with the control panel and waiting during the descent

segments.scene_description: Inside the descending elevator cage, the lighting shifts from teal to red as the character travels between levels. The mesh walls of the elevator are visible as the character waits for the ride to complete.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower level industrial maintenance corridor near server room

events.description: exits elevator into the lower level with red emergency lighting
enters a narrow maintenance tunnel with exposed pipes

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit lower corridors, passing the server room and entering a narrow maintenance tunnel

entered.detail: heavy airlock door with illuminated SERVER ROOM sign above it
large red and gray pipes running along the corridor walls
tight passage with exposed conduits and utility systems

segments.scene_description: The character exits the elevator into a red-lit industrial corridor with prominent piping along the walls. Passing a door marked SERVER ROOM, the character continues into an increasingly narrow maintenance tunnel with exposed utilities.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a sterile industrial facility that transitions from a teal-lit equipment room into a series of red-hued maintenance corridors. It begins among metal lockers and storage racks in a compact room, moving toward a heavy airlock door marked with a welcome sign for Fort Solis. As the camera passes through a yellow-lit transitional corridor, the space opens into a larger hub dominated by red emergency lighting and a curved window overlooking a dark exterior landscape. The scene then shifts back into a narrow yellow corridor and through another airlock into a caged elevator, where the lighting fluctuates between teal and red during the descent. Finally, the camera exits the elevator into a red-lit industrial zone, passing a server room and moving deeper into a narrow maintenance tunnel lined with exposed piping and utilities.
